caption: A man wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and dark trousers stands on a dark stage next to a podium, positioned against a dark curtain. Large projection screens behind him display a variety of graphics. One screen features a blue stylized bird logo on a blue background, while another shows a server rack centered on a glowing blue platform with the text "SurCloud All-In-One Appliance For OpenStack" at the top and the "SurCloud" logo in the bottom left corner. A separate blue graphic displays the "openstack summit" logo in white. The video transitions between these different visual layouts on the screens while the man remains stationary on the stage. The lighting is focused on the man and the podium, contrasting with the bright, blue-toned digital imagery projected on the screens behind him.
